mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.publication_no AS publicationNo, p.title, p.applicant, p.`abstract` AS patentAbstract, p.publication_date AS publicationDate, p.source_type AS sourceType, p.parse_status AS parseStatus, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM patent p
LEFT JOIN patent_domain pd ON p.id = pd.patent_id
LEFT JOIN patent_entity pe ON p.id = pe.patent_id
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND p.`abstract` LIKE CONCAT('%', #{abstractKeyword}, '%')
AND p.applicant LIKE CONCAT('%', #{applicant}, '%')
AND pd.domain_code LIKE CONCAT(#{domainCode}, '%')
AND pe.entity_type = #{entityType}
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
